full_text:
Li Zhuan (Qinzhong) 李譔 (欽仲)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Zhuan (李譔), styledQinzhong (欽仲), was born in Fu. Fond of practical jokes, admired by Liu Xuan but not given important tasks. Skilled scholar. Li Zhuan was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
